title: Novavax Inc (NVAX) Q3 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Strategic Partnerships and Financial Adjustments Amid Market Challenges
text: Novavax reported Q3 2024 total revenue of $85 million, with product sales reaching $38 million compared to just $2 million in the prior year period. Cost of sales decreased to $61 million from $99 million year-over-year, while operating expenses fell 26%. The company maintains a robust financial position, ending Q3 with over a billion in cash and accounts receivables. Management revised full-year 2024 revenue guidance to $650–$700 million, with product sales projected between $175–$225 million. The company increased licensing and royalty revenue expectations to $475 million annually. A significant partnership with Sanofi will generate double-digit royalties from Sanofi's sales of the COVID-19 vaccine starting in 2025. The agreement includes potential milestone payments up to $700 million. The FDA removed a clinical hold on the company's COVID-19/influenza combination vaccine candidate, allowing phase three trials to proceed. Current market share stands at approximately 3%, below expectations due to mRNA vaccine competition and limited initial retail distribution. The company is exploring the potential sale of its Czech manufacturing facility.
